customInstructions: This is the Official Previous Year Paper for HP HRTC Conductor Exam held in 2020.
Total Questions: 170, Total Marks: 85, Total Time: 120 Minutes (2 Hrs).
There is NO negative marking in this exam.
The test comprehensively covers History, Geography, Polity, Economy, General Science, Logical Reasoning, Current Affairs, HP GK, English, and Hindi.
